title: 9 by MC
description: Instantly sets your game to a 9:16 vertical resolution, perfect for YouTube Shorts, TikTok, and Reels.
body:
![Showcasing mod functionality (game resolutinon changed to 9/16)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YnkDa46v/images/f874a0c5c8126a1d7c35b66319ee2e6b3d356104.png)

Changes the game resolution to 9/16 by blacking out everything else. Perfect for making vertical videos! (TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels)
